svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 18px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2328;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2328, #cdd0d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: F1 · Sinkhorn-Knopp：交替归一化把矩阵投到双随机集合

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 71px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #59636e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#59636e, #929ba4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 列归一会扰动行和；行归一又会扰动列和，所以必须交替，直到两边都接近 1。
